calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-13-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: June Lethley.
Claudia J. Castillo, Esq. for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., a national banking association.
Order allowing witness to appear by declaration and have live testimony waived at default Prove-Up Hearing, granted and signed in court.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Eder Marketing Group, Inc., a corporation and Roy H. Eder as follows:
Damages $35,541.76
Prejudgment Interest $26,972.98
Attorney's Fees $1,309.50
Costs $392.50, for a total of $64,216.74
Judgment signed in open court.
